items.title: South Africa to deploy troops to tackle crime gangs
items.dek: President Cyril Ramaphosa says the army will work with the police to fight organised crime and illegal mining.
items.body: President Cyril Ramaphosa says the army will work with the police to fight organised crime and illegal mining.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: FBI releases description of suspect in Nancy Guthrie kidnapping
items.dek: The 84-year-old mother of news anchor Savannah Guthrie disappeared from her Arizona home two weeks ago.
items.body: The 84-year-old mother of news anchor Savannah Guthrie disappeared from her Arizona home two weeks ago.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Rubio warns Europe of new era in geopolitics before big Munich speech
items.dek: The US Secretary of State will address the first major transatlantic meeting since Donald Trump threatened to annex Greenland.
items.body: The US Secretary of State will address the first major transatlantic meeting since Donald Trump threatened to annex Greenland.
items.author: IriLine Desk
